note: r0 baseline. Bollinger-20-upper + ADX>25 + vol confirm on SOL/AVAX/BNB. winter -25.4% / sharpe -2.33; full_5y -1.1% on 974 trades / sharpe -0.0078. The new affordances both worked: pair_basket isolated BNB-specific MR alpha cleanly, test_timeranges proved cross-regime robustness. r1 priority: relax entry to RSI<30 to lift trade count and per-regime profit.
